title: KL House
shortDescription: A modern two-story home with a warm Scandinavian-minimalist aesthetic. The interior pairs natural oak wood with clean white surfaces throughout - from the U-shaped kitchen with brass accents and built-in appliances, to the open-plan living area featuring a low oak TV console with an integrated electric fireplace, a light bouclé sectional sofa, and a solid-base staircase with oak treads and vertical wooden slat railings.
